2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Migration: Add rate limiting functions for authentication\r\n-- Date: 2026-03-07\r\n-- Purpose: Implement rate limiting to prevent brute force attacks\r\n-- Phase: 4 (Security Hardening)\r\n\r\n-- ============================================\r\n-- LOGIN RATE LIMITING\r\n-- ============================================\r\n\r\n-- Create a table to track login attempts\r\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS login_attempts (\r\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\r\n  identifier TEXT NOT NULL, -- username or email\r\n  ip_address INET NOT NULL,\r\n  attempt_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  was_successful BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE\r\n)","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Describe","ObjectType":"P","Name":""}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Create index for fast lookups\r\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_login_attempts_identifier_time \r\n  ON login_attempts(identifier, attempt_time DESC)","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Describe","ObjectType":"P","Name":""}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_login_attempts_ip_time \r\n  ON login_attempts(ip_address, attempt_time DESC)","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Describe","ObjectType":"P","Name":""}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Function to check if login is rate limited\r\nCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION is_login_rate_limited(\r\n  p_identifier TEXT,\r\n  p_ip_address INET,\r\n  p_max_attempts INT DEFAULT 5,\r\n  p_lockout_minutes INT DEFAULT 15\r\n)\r\nRETURNS TABLE (\r\n  is_limited BOOLEAN,\r\n  attempts_count INT,\r\n  lockout_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\r\n) AS $$\r\nDECLARE\r\n  v_recent_attempts INT;\r\n  v_lockout_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE;\r\nBEGIN\r\n  -- Count failed attempts in the last N minutes\r\n  v_recent_attempts := COUNT(*)::INT FROM login_attempts\r\n    WHERE identifier = p_identifier\r\n    AND attempt_time \u003e NOW() - (p_lockout_minutes || ' minutes')::INTERVAL\r\n    AND was_successful = FALSE;\r\n\r\n  IF v_recent_attempts \u003e= p_max_attempts THEN\r\n    v_lockout_time := (\r\n      SELECT attempt_time + (p_lockout_minutes || ' minutes')::INTERVAL\r\n      FROM login_attempts\r\n      WHERE identifier = p_identifier\r\n      AND attempt_time \u003e NOW() - (p_lockout_minutes || ' minutes')::INTERVAL\r\n      AND was_successful = FALSE\r\n      ORDER BY attempt_time DESC\r\n      LIMIT 1\r\n    );\r\n    RETURN QUERY SELECT TRUE, v_recent_attempts, v_lockout_time;\r\n  ELSE\r\n    RETURN QUERY SELECT FALSE, v_recent_attempts, NULL;\r\n  END IF;\r\nEND;\r\n$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql STABLE","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Describe","ObjectType":"P","Name":""}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Function to record login attempt\r\nCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION record_login_attempt(\r\n  p_identifier TEXT,\r\n  p_ip_address INET,\r\n  p_was_successful BOOLEAN\r\n)\r\nRETURNS void AS $$\r\nBEGIN\r\n  INSERT INTO login_attempts (identifier, ip_address, was_successful, attempt_time)\r\n  VALUES (p_identifier, p_ip_address, p_was_successful, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);\r\n  \r\n  -- Clean up old records (older than 1 day)\r\n  DELETE FROM login_attempts \r\n  WHERE attempt_time \u003c NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day';\r\nEND;\r\n$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Describe","ObjectType":"P","Name":""}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- ============================================\r\n-- PIN ATTEMPT RATE LIMITING (for members)\r\n-- ============================================\r\n\r\n-- Function to check if member PIN is rate limited\r\nCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION is_member_pin_locked(p_member_id UUID)\r\nRETURNS TABLE (\r\n  is_locked BOOLEAN,\r\n  locked_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,\r\n  attempts INT\r\n) AS $$\r\nBEGIN\r\n  RETURN QUERY SELECT\r\n    (pin_locked_until \u003e CURRENT_TIMESTAMP),\r\n    pin_locked_until,\r\n    pin_attempts\r\n  FROM members\r\n  WHERE id = p_member_id;\r\nEND;\r\n$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql STABLE","ParameterOIDs":null}

2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Function to increment PIN attempts and lock if needed\r\nCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION increment_pin_attempts(\r\n  p_member_id UUID,\r\n  p_max_attempts INT DEFAULT 5,\r\n  p_lockout_minutes INT DEFAULT 15\r\n)\r\nRETURNS void AS $$\r\nDECLARE\r\n  v_current_attempts INT;\r\nBEGIN\r\n  UPDATE members\r\n  SET pin_attempts = pin_attempts + 1\r\n  WHERE id = p_member_id;\r\n\r\n  SELECT pin_attempts INTO v_current_attempts FROM members WHERE id = p_member_id;\r\n\r\n  -- Lock account if max attempts reached\r\n  IF v_current_attempts \u003e= p_max_attempts THEN\r\n    UPDATE members\r\n    SET pin_locked_until = NOW() + (p_lockout_minutes || ' minutes')::INTERVAL\r\n    WHERE id = p_member_id;\r\n  END IF;\r\nEND;\r\n$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}

2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/14 01:51:01 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Function to reset PIN attempts on successful login\r\nCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION reset_pin_attempts(p_member_id UUID)\r\nRETURNS void AS $$\r\nBEGIN\r\n  UPDATE members\r\n  SET \r\n    pin_attempts = 0,\r\n    pin_locked_until = NULL,\r\n    last_login = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\r\n  WHERE id = p_member_id;\r\nEND;\r\n$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql","ParameterOIDs":null}
